description.ko: 수학적 질서와 무질서한 디지털 파편화가 만나는 고대비 탐구.
description.en: A high-contrast exploration of mathematical order meeting chaotic digital fragmentation.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract by KURO-X, titled 'The Synchronized Digital Collapse.' The structure is captured mid-shatter, exploding into a precision vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 geometric shards against a clinical #FFFFFF void. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, datamoshing textures, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration intersect the razor-sharp polygonal planes. High-contrast cinematic lighting with ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian surfaces. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical beauty of digital chaos within order.
